title: Chapter 2
text: This one is for all my Love Larks who have struggled with mental health. Writing this book was intense therapy for me, dredging up some deep hurts from a long time ago. I just want to tell you that every part of you, the things that bring you pleasure and the things that bring you pain, the parts of yourself you’re most proud of and the parts that seem like your own worst enemy eating you alive from the inside…it all makes up your mind, and your mind is beautiful and perfect, because it’s the only one like it. You are irreplaceable. You are one of a kind. You are art. – Sophie
